query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trial_exit_surveys (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trialUserId INT NOT NULL,
  overallRating INT,
  wouldRecommend INT,
  easeOfUseRating INT,
  featureCompletenessRating INT,
  designRating INT,
  valuePropositionRating INT,
  mostUsefulFeature TEXT,
  missingFeatures TEXT,
  biggestConcerns TEXT,
  additionalComments TEXT,
  interestedInJoining ENUM('yes', 'no', 'maybe'),
  preferredFollowUp ENUM('email', 'call', 'demo', 'none'),
  completedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_exit_survey (trialUserId),
  FOREIGN KEY (trialUserId) REFERENCES trial_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
